titles.title: Rise up and Complete the Job

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've been called to walk where no other age has Of all dispensations we are the last The harvest is ripe but the labourers are few The work that must be done falls on me and you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Refuse to be compromised by the enemy Keep your eyes fixed on the prize set before you and me There is much work to be done so we must Rise up and complete the job

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We've been called to be light bearers in this age Shining forth God's glory, oh what a privilege By our prophet messenger our lamps have been lit We're a city on a hill whose glory can't be hid

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Each age was given a word to manifest There were always believers who rose and stood the test Now there is a word that's allotted to this age We've been called to manifest the fullness of this message
